# Feature: Authentication

## Setup Command
```
composer require laravel/breeze --dev
php artisan breeze:install blade
npm install && npm run build
php artisan migrate
```

---

## Register

**Route:** `GET /register`, `POST /register`  
**Controller:** `App\Http\Controllers\Auth\RegisteredUserController` (generated by Breeze)  
**View:** `resources/views/auth/register.blade.php`

### Fields
| Field | Type | Validation |
|---|---|---|
| name | text | required, string, max:255 |
| email | email | required, string, email, max:255, unique:users |
| password | password | required, string, min:8, confirmed |
| password_confirmation | password | must match password |

### Behaviour
- On success: creates user, logs them in, redirects to `/dashboard`
- On failure: returns to form with `$errors` bag populated

---

## Login

**Route:** `GET /login`, `POST /login`  
**Controller:** `App\Http\Controllers\Auth\AuthenticatedSessionController` (generated by Breeze)  
**View:** `resources/views/auth/login.blade.php`

### Fields
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| email | email | |
| password | password | |
| remember | checkbox | optional, activates remember-me cookie |

### Behaviour
- On success: redirects to `/dashboard`
- On failure: returns to form with error message

---

## Logout

**Route:** `POST /logout`  
**Controller:** `App\Http\Controllers\Auth\AuthenticatedSessionController@destroy`

### Behaviour
- Invalidates the session
- Regenerates CSRF token
- Redirects to `/login`
- Must be triggered via a form with `@csrf` — never a plain GET link

```html
<form method="POST" action="{{ route('logout') }}">
    @csrf
    <button type="submit">Log Out</button>
</form>
```

---

## View Structure (generated by Breeze)
```
resources/views/
└── auth/
    ├── login.blade.php
    ├── register.blade.php
    ├── confirm-password.blade.php
    ├── forgot-password.blade.php
    ├── reset-password.blade.php
    └── verify-email.blade.php
```

---

## Middleware
- `auth` middleware is applied to all protected routes in `routes/web.php`
- Breeze registers `RedirectIfAuthenticated` middleware on guest routes
- After successful login, `Illuminate\Auth\Middleware\Authenticate` redirects to `route('login')` if unauthenticated

---

## Post-Auth Redirect
- After register → `/dashboard`
- After login → `/dashboard`  
  *(Set in `app/Http/Controllers/Auth/AuthenticatedSessionController` via `$request->intended(route('dashboard'))`)*
- After logout → `/login`
